title: Rusted Iron
description: RUSTED IRON adds the copper oxidization feature to Iron Blocks in the form of rust!
body: **RUSTED IRON** adds the copper oxidization feature to Iron Blocks in the form of rust. It also adds Cut iron blocks for extra decoration! **Fabric Requires:** [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) **Forge Requires:** [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) ### FAQ **Will you backport to X version?** No! **Why didn't you add rusted iron bars/ iron doors/ cauldrons/ golems/ etc?** In vanilla not all blocks containing copper oxidize (i.e. lightning rods), only the block of copper and cut copper do. We felt like it was important to be consistent with that precedent and it would be difficult to draw the line of what blocks containing iron do/don't rust. **I found a bug!** Oh no! Please create a Github issue on the mod's repository. **How can I stay up to date with the latest?** Joining our Discord! [![](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/533102487880859648/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/D5bNnw7)
